## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `monkeyrun run --platform ... --app ... --events ...`
2. Wait for ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g. macOS 15.2, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11)
- **monkeyrun version**: (run `monkeyrun --version`)
- **Go version**: (if built from source — run `go version`)
- **Platform**: Android / iOS
- **Device/Emulator**: (e.g. Pixel 8 emulator, iPhone 15 Pro simulator)
